char const* const best_lock_tool()
{
    char const* const result = "skeleton_key";
    
    if (!inv_has("skeleton_key"))
    {
        result = "fine_lockpick";
        
        if (!inv_has("fine_lockpick"))
        {
            result = "lockpick";
            
            if (!inv_has("lockpick"))
            {
                if (inv_has("rusty_pick"))
                    return "rusty_pick";
                
                return "none";
            }
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}

            result = inv_has("rusty_pick");

                /* tailcall */
                return inv_has("skeleton_key");
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}

int64_t paint_normal()
{
    char* rax = getenv("AETER_AUTOTEST");
    
    if (!rax || !*rax)
        system("cls");
    else if (*rax == 0x30 && !rax[1])
        system("cls");
    
    show_room();
    
    if (g_transcript)
        puts(&g_transcript);
    
    /* tailcall */
    return fflush(__acrt_iob_func(1));
}

char* run_game_menu()
{
    _.text(0x2058);
    
    while (true)
    {
        char* rax_1 = getenv("AETER_AUTOTEST");
        
        if (!rax_1 || !*rax_1)
            system("cls");
        else if (*rax_1 == 0x30 && !rax_1[1])
            system("cls");
        
        ui_print_title("AETERNITAS64 MENU");
        world_slug(g_room);
        int32_t room_1 = g_room;
        char* rax_3 = aet_mods_room_title(room_1);
        
        if (!rax_3 || !*rax_3)
            rax_3 = world_title(room_1);
        
        printf("  Location: %s  [%s]\n", rax_3);
        g_health;
        g_max_health;
        int32_t coins_1 = g_coins;
        int32_t score_1 = g_score;
        printf("  Turn: %d   HP: %d/%d   Score: %d   Coins: %d\n", g_turns);
        int32_t var_1e58;
        pc_format_hud_tag(&var_1e58, 0x60);
        printf("  %s\n\n", &var_1e58);
        puts("  1  Resume game");
        puts("  2  Save quicksave");
        puts("  3  Load quicksave");
        puts("  4  Save slot");
        puts("  5  Load slot");

}

}

int64_t write_text_if_missing(char* arg1, char* arg2, int32_t* arg3)
{
    *arg3 = 0;

        FILE* _Stream_1 = fopen(arg1, "wb");

            return 0;

        fclose(_Stream_1);
        *arg3 = 1;
    }
    else
        fclose(_Stream);
    
    return 1;
}

char const* const get_skin_type(char* arg1)
{
    char const* const result = &data_140079bc1;
    
    if (strcmp(arg1, "Catfolk") && strcmp(arg1, "Foxfolk") && strcmp(arg1, "Wolfkin")
        && strcmp(arg1, "Minotaur") && strcmp(arg1, "Wolfmorph") && strcmp(arg1, "Rabbitmorph")
        && strcmp(arg1, "Rathshar") && strcmp(arg1, "Lucerni") && strcmp(arg1, "Horse-morph")
        && strcmp(arg1, "Cow-morph") && strcmp(arg1, "Pig Orc"))
    {
        result = "scales";
        
        if (strcmp(arg1, "Draconic") && strcmp(arg1, "Kobold") && strcmp(arg1, "Lizardfolk")
            && strcmp(arg1, "Lamia") && strcmp(arg1, "Tiefling") && strcmp(arg1, "Merfolk"))
        {
            if (strcmp(arg1, "Arachnid") && strcmp(arg1, "Insectoid")
                && strcmp(arg1, "Spider-morph") && strcmp(arg1, "Drider")
                && strcmp(arg1, "Insect-morph"))
            {
                if (!strcmp(arg1, "Harpy"))
                    return "feathers";
                
                if (strcmp(arg1, "Android") && strcmp(arg1, "Cyborg"))
                {
                    if (!strcmp(arg1, "Sylph"))
                        return "translucent";
                    
                    if (!strcmp(arg1, "Dryad"))
                        return "bark";
                    
                    return "skin";
                }
                
                return "synthskin";
            }
            
            return "chitin";
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}
